form.formComment: Second up after running 11th over 2600m at Lyon-Parilly beaten 34m by Lapon De Bertrange in 5yo gelding race on April 5. Not keen.

formComments.comment: Second up after running 11th over 2600m at Lyon-Parilly beaten 34m by Lapon De Bertrange in 5yo gelding race on April 5. Not keen.

form.formComment: Having her second run back from a spell. Good run when 3rd over 2550m at this track beaten 32m by Latino Elde in 5yo race on March 1 at $23. Strips fitter and is sure to play a significant role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Having her second run back from a spell. Good run when 3rd over 2550m at this track beaten 32m by Latino Elde in 5yo race on March 1 at $23. Strips fitter and is sure to play a significant role.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 9th over 2750m at La Capelle beaten 48m by Lovely Du Rabutin in 5yo mare race on March 22. Before that 6th over 2500m at this track beaten 58m by Legende Du Gers in 5-6yo mare race on March 14 at $28. Others have better credentials.

formComments.comment: Didn't do much last time out, 9th over 2750m at La Capelle beaten 48m by Lovely Du Rabutin in 5yo mare race on March 22. Before that 6th over 2500m at this track beaten 58m by Legende Du Gers in 5-6yo mare race on March 14 at $28. Others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Last start disqualified at Rambouillet on March 29 over 2800m. Before that, a game effort when 3rd over 2500m at this track beaten 6.6m by Legende Du Gers in 5-6yo mare race on March 14 at $10. Top-three finish is well within her grasp.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start disqualified at Rambouillet on March 29 over 2800m. Before that, a game effort when 3rd over 2500m at this track beaten 6.6m by Legende Du Gers in 5-6yo mare race on March 14 at $10. Top-three finish is well within her grasp.

form.formComment: Last start 8th over 2700m at Le Croisé-Laroche, beaten 87m by L'amiral Chatault in 5yo gelding race on March 23 at $197. At his previous start solid effort when 3rd over 2800m at Chartres beaten 32m by Louis Gaillard in 5yo race on March 1. Keep him in mind.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 8th over 2700m at Le Croisé-Laroche, beaten 87m by L'amiral Chatault in 5yo gelding race on March 23 at $197. At his previous start solid effort when 3rd over 2800m at Chartres beaten 32m by Louis Gaillard in 5yo race on March 1. Keep him in mind.

form.formComment: Last start good run when 3rd over 2450m at Caen beaten 5.4m by L'appassionato in 5yo gelding race on March 16 at $6.60. Two runs back posted a big 5.4m win at this track beating Label Daddy in 5yo race on March 1. Going along well. Top prospects.
